task_completion.description: Add two Launch Guides to the exterior of the booster body tube.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows two 'Launch lug' or 'Launch guide' components attached as children to the booster body tube.

task_completion.description: Add a 45-gram Mass Component named 'Altimeter' to the avionics/payload bay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree shows a mass component named 'Altimeter' in the payload/avionics bay, and the component configuration window shows its mass set to 45g (or 0.045kg).

task_completion.description: Run a flight simulation to obtain max altitude, max velocity, and stability margin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket 'Flight Simulations' tab shows a completed simulation run with populated numerical values for altitude, velocity, and stability.
The OpenRocket window title shows 'flight_ready_retrofit.ork', or a file manager/terminal shows this file saved in the /home/ga/Documents/rockets/ directory.

task_completion.description: Generate an integration report documenting the added components and simulation results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows a file named 'hardware_penalty_report.txt' in /home/ga/Documents/exports/ containing a list of the added components (launch guides, altimeter) and the simulated max altitude, max velocity, and stability margin.

task_completion.description: Include an explanation of the altitude decrease addressing parasitic drag and added mass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'hardware_penalty_report.txt' contains a written explanation that explicitly mentions 'parasitic drag' (or drag from the exterior guides) and 'added mass' (or weight from the altimeter) as the causes for the altitude decrease.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket application open with the rocket design loaded, modified, and simulated, rather than the agent just editing XML/ORK files directly in a text editor.

integrity.description: The simulation results in the report match the actual simulated values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The max altitude, velocity, and stability margin written in the text report match the numbers visible in the OpenRocket Flight Simulations tab.

integrity.description: The agent manually created the report rather than copying a pre-existing template.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or echoing the report contents into the text file, and the contents reflect the specific numerical results of the current simulation run.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required output paths are /home/ga/Documents/rockets/flight_ready_retrofit.ork for the design and /home/ga/Documents/exports/hardware_penalty_report.txt for the report. The design must include exactly 2 launch guides and an altimeter mass component weighing exactly 45g (0.045kg, with a tolerance of +/- 0.002kg).
